test_max_size.description: The maximum resize size for test
test_max_size.title: Test max size

test_min_size.description: The minimum resize size for test data
test_min_size.title: Test min size

train_crop_size.description: The random crop size for training data in [H, W]
train_crop_size.title: Train crop size

train_max_size.description: The maximum random crop size for training data
train_max_size.title: Train max size

train_min_size.description: A list of sizes to perform random resize.
train_min_size.title: Train min size

contiguous_id.description: Flag to enable contiguous ids for labels.
contiguous_id.title: contiguous id

label_map.description: A path to label map file
label_map.title: label map

pin_memory.description: Flag to enable the dataloader to allocate pagelocked memory
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

pixel_mean.description: The input mean for RGB frames
pixel_mean.title: input mean per pixel

pixel_std.description: The input standard deviation per pixel for RGB frames
pixel_std.title: input std per pixel

quant_calibration_dataset.description: Configurable parameters for the quantization calibration dataset.

images_dir.description: Path to images directory for quantization calibration
images_dir.title: images directory

test.description: Configurable parameters to construct the test dataset.

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the train dataset.

val.description: Configurable parameters to construct the validation dataset.

workers.description: The number of parallel workers processing data
workers.title: workers

cpe_max_size.description: Maximum size of the cropped positional embedding.
cpe_max_size.title: cpe max size

num_heads.description: Number of heads of each stage.
num_heads.title: num heads

qk_scale.description: Override default qk scale of head_dim ** -0.5 if set.
qk_scale.title: qk scale

export.description: A flag to enable export mode.
export.title: export

transformer_in_feature.description: Name of the transformer input feature.
transformer_in_feature.title: transformer in feature

deformable_transformer_encoder_in_featur.description: List of feature names for deformable transformer encoder input.
deformable_transformer_encoder_in_featur.title: transformer encoder in_features

ignore_value.description: Value to ignore in the semantic segmentation head.
ignore_value.title: ignore value

in_features.description: List of feature names for the semantic segmentation head input.
in_features.title: in features

loss_weight.description: Loss weight of the semantic segmentation head.
loss_weight.title: loss weight

name.description: Name of the semantic segmentation head.
name.title: name

object_mask_threshold.description:
The value of the threshold to be used when
                    filtering out the object mask.
object_mask_threshold.title: object mask threshold

overlap_threshold.description:
The value of the threshold to be used when
                    evaluating overlap.
overlap_threshold.title: overlap threshold

test_topk_per_image.description: keep topk instances per image for instance segmentation.
test_topk_per_image.title: top k per image

model_name.description: Name of model if invoking task via :code:`model_agnostic`
model_name.title: Model name

quantize.description: Configurable parameters to run model quantization for a OneFormer experiment.

algorithm.description: Calibration/optimization algorithm. Used by ModelOpt backends (modelopt.pytorch and modelopt.onnx). Ignored by torchao backend.
algorithm.title: Calibration algorithm

backend_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the backend
backend_kwargs.title: Backend kwargs

device.description: Device to use for calibration. Accepts 'cuda' (uses default GPU), 'cpu', 'trt' (TensorRT for ONNX backend), or specific GPU device like 'cuda:0', 'cuda:1', etc. If 'cuda' is specified but no GPU is available, the framework will automatically fall back to 'cpu'. Note: 'trt' is only supported by the modelopt.onnx backend for ONNX Runtime with TensorRT execution provider.
device.title: Calibration device

layers.description: List of per-module quantization configurations. Each entry specifies which modules to quantize and their data types. This is the primary way to configure quantization.
layers.title: Layer quantization configs

model_path.description: Path to the model to be quantized. For ONNX backend, path to ONNX file.
model_path.title: Model path

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

skip_names.description: List of module/layer names or patterns to exclude from quantization
skip_names.title: Skip names

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the trainer for a OneFormer experiment.

accumulate_grad_batches.description: Number of batches to accumulate gradients over.
accumulate_grad_batches.title: accumulate grad batches

checkpoint_interval_unit.description: The unit of the checkpoint interval.
checkpoint_interval_unit.title: Checkpoint interval unit

clip_grad_norm.description:
Amount to clip the gradient by L2 Norm.
        A value of 0.0 specifies no clipping.
clip_grad_norm.title: clip gradient norm

clip_gradients.description: Hyper parameters to configure the gradient clipping.
clip_gradients.title: clip gradients

distributed_strategy.description:
The multi-GPU training strategy.
        DDP (Distributed Data Parallel) and Fully Sharded DDP are supported.
distributed_strategy.title: distributed_strategy

freeze.description:
List of layer names to freeze.
        Example: ["backbone", "transformer.encoder", "input_proj"].
freeze.title: freeze

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the training on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in train.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

is_dry_run.description:
Whether to run the trainer in Dry Run mode. This serves
        as a good means to validate the spec file and run a sanity check on the trainer
        without actually initializing and running the trainer.
is_dry_run.title: Is dry run

num_epochs.description: Number of epochs to train for.
num_epochs.title: number of epochs

num_gpus.description: Number of GPUs to train on.
num_gpus.title: number of gpus

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to train on.
num_nodes.title: number of nodes

optim.description: Hyper parameters to configure the optimizer.

backbone_multiplier.description: A multiplier for backbone learning rate.
backbone_multiplier.title: backbone learning rate multiplier

gamma.description: Multiplicative factor of learning rate decay.
gamma.title: gamma

lr.description: The initial learning rate for training the model.
lr.title: learning rate

lr_scheduler.description:
The learning scheduler:
                    * MultiStep : Decrease the lr by lr_decay from lr_steps
                    * Warmuppoly : Poly learning rate schedule.
lr_scheduler.title: learning rate scheduler

max_iter.description: Number of iterations to train for.
max_iter.title: max iter

momentum.description: The momentum for the AdamW optimizer.
momentum.title: momentum - AdamW

monitor_name.description: The metric value to be monitored for the :code:`AutoReduce` Scheduler.
monitor_name.title: monitor_name

type.description: Type of optimizer used to train the network.

warmup_factor.description: Factor to warmup the learning rate.
warmup_factor.title: warmup factor

optim.title: optimizer

precision.description: Precision to run the training on.
precision.title: precision

pretrained_backbone.description: Path to a pre-trained backbone to initialize the current training from.

pretrained_model.description: Path to a pre-trained OneFormer model to initialize the current training from.

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

resume_training_checkpoint_path.description: Path to a pre-trained OneFormer model to initialize the current training from.

verbose.description: Flag to enable printing of detailed learning rate scaling from the optimizer.
verbose.title: enable verbose logs
